texto: You and I, Mia. We have needs that must be attended. I will look after yours, and you will look after mine.” He sighs, and his fingers move to his suit jacket and deftly undoes the buttons, letting it fall open to reveal a smart black shirt and tie underneath. “I’ve waited for this moment for so long.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Claire C. Riley sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “You and I, Mia. We have needs that must be attended. I will look after yours, and you will look a…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a tempo, love, lust, útil em momentos de termino e lust.
